calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing on Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. Arlo H. Smith, Esq. appeared for the Plaintiff, Mike Garza and Defendant, Eduardo Aceves appeared in pro per along with his Spanish Interpreter, Rueben Emery. The case settled per stipulation of parties and read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
